scope: R4 testing-and-acceptance hardening for governance + shared/runtime pure logic
scenario: Validate that governance checks, unit-test coverage, and the main verify chain all pass together after the testing hardening work.
steps: Verify document and governance entry points remain aligned.
Run unit tests for shared targeting, prompt composition, context pack, runtime actions, and reconstruction refine logic.
Run typecheck and the full verify pipeline to confirm docs, governance, tests, and plugin validation pass together.
observations: The full verify pipeline passed end-to-end.
The unit test suite passed 20 scenarios.
Governance checks still emit line-limit grace advisories for known large files, but they did not block acceptance.
follow_up: Add server-side reconstruction job lifecycle state-flow tests.
Run separate live Figma and live bridge acceptance and record them under reports/acceptance or reports/quality.
